description_long: This is a modern, three-seater couch with a sleek, angular silhouette and a mid-century design influence. The upholstery is a muted grayish-brown fabric, with two large seat cushions and a continuous, vertically paneled backrest. The armrests are straight and slightly flared, matching the height of the backrest and giving the couch a boxy, structured appearance. Two dark gray accent pillows are placed at either end, providing additional comfort and visual contrast. The couch stands on four exposed, tapered wooden legs, which are angled outward for stability and style. The overall look is minimalist yet inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, grayish-brown three-seater couch with straight armrests, paneled backrest, and tapered wooden legs. Includes two dark gray accent pillows for added comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat cushions, paneled backrest, and two accent pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, flared armrest and the depth of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, vertically paneled backrest and the angled wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and a continuous, vertically paneled backrest; two loose accent pillows placed at each end.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color fabric with subtle vertical paneling on the backrest; no visible decorative stitching or motifs.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, medium-height, outward-angled tapered wooden legs with a smooth finish.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, slightly flared armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in matching fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, vertically paneled backrest integrated with the frame and fully upholstered.
